prompt:
Extreme high-fidelity 4K vertical cinematic render for Instagram Reels. 
Target: Spiritual/Success. 
Visual Hook: Ganesha + Obstacles + Success + Ancient Science. 
Aesthetic: Premium, Sharp, Industrial, Cinematic Lighting. 
Style: Close-up macro shots mixed with sweeping wide views. 
Resolution: 2160x3840. 
Framerate: 60fps for hyper-smooth motion.
